title: vatica oblonga
intro: Vatica oblonga, also known as the Malabar neem or Indian liane, is a tropical plant species native to the Western Ghats mountain range in India. The plant is used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Vatica oblonga include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems. Vatica oblonga is often prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and its leaves can also be used to make a paste for topical applications.
